en: you don't think anyone will vote for her?
ko: 그녀를 위해 투표할 사람은 없을 거라고 생각해?

en: I mean, that sounds bad, but whatever.
The Spring Fling Queen is always pretty.
ko: 스프링 플링 여왕은 항상 예뻐야 해.

en: I mean, the crazy thing is, is that it should be Karen,
but people forget about her because she's such a slut. Anyway, I gotta go. I'm going to bed.
ko: 사람들이 그녀를 잊어버려, 그녀가 너무 방탕해서. 어쨌든, 나 가야 해. 잘 자.

en: Well, she's not mad at you. Hold on. Are you okay? Shh. Hello?
ko: 그녀는 너에게 화난 게 아니야. 잠깐만. 괜찮아? 쉿. 안녕?

en: If someone said something bad about you,
ko: 누군가 너에 대해 나쁜 말을 한다면,

en: you'd want me to tell you, right? No.
ko: 너는 내가 말해주길 원할 거지, 맞지? 아니.

en: What if it was someone you thought was your friend? Woody? Hold on, other line. I'm not taking this anymore. Good for you, Gretchen.
ko: 만약 그 사람이 네가 친구라고 생각했던 사람이라면? 우디? 잠깐, 다른 전화. 더 이상은 못 참겠어. 잘했어, 그레첸.

en: Hello? Let's go out. Okay, hold on. I'm on the other line with Gretchen. Don't invite Gretchen.
ko: 안녕? 나가자. 알겠어, 잠깐만. 그레첸과 통화 중이야. 그레첸을 초대하지 마.

en: She's driving me nuts. Hold on. Okay, hurry up. It's Regina. I'm sorry. I'm sorry.
ko: 그녀가 날 미치게 해. 잠깐만. 알겠어, 서둘러. 레지나야. 미안해. 미안해.

en: I'm sorry. I'm sorry. I'm sorry. I'm sorry. I'm sorry. I'm sorry. I'm sorry.
ko: 미안해. 미안해. 미안해. 미안해. 미안해. 미안해. 미안해.

en: It's Regina. She wants to hang out with me tonight,
ko: 레지나야. 오늘 밤 나랑 놀고 싶대,

en: but she told me not to tell you.
Do not hang out with her. Why?
